query:
-- Pegar os IDs únicos (sem repetição) dos estabs que não têm Instagram
-- Usar UNION para pegar tanto id1 quanto id2 sem Instagram
WITH duplicate_pairs AS (
  SELECT e1.id as id1, e1.name as name1, e1.instagram as ig1, e1.address as addr1, e1.addressNumber as num1, e1.neighborhood as bairro1,
         e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.instagram as ig2
  FROM establishments e1
  JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address 
    AND e1.addressNumber = e2.addressNumber 
    AND e1.id < e2.id
    AND e1.address IS NOT NULL 
    AND e1.address != ''
    AND e1.addressNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND e1.addressNumber != ''
    AND e1.neighborhood = e2.neighborhood
  WHERE (
    LOWER(e1.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e2.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(e2.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e1.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
  )
),
unique_ids AS (
  SELECT id1 as id, name1 as name, addr1 as address, num1 as addressNumber, bairro1 as neighborhood FROM duplicate_pairs WHERE ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = ''
  UNION
  SELECT id2 as id, name2 as name, addr1 as address, num1 as addressNumber, bairro1 as neighborhood FROM duplicate_pairs WHERE ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = ''
)
SELECT id, name, address, addressNumber, neighborhood FROM unique_ids ORDER BY name LIMIT 300;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
-- Pegar os IDs únicos (sem repetição) dos estabs que não têm Instagram
-- Usar UNION para pegar tanto id1 quanto id2 sem Instagram
WITH duplicate_pairs AS (
  SELECT e1.id as id1, e1.name as name1, e1.instagram as ig1, e1.address as addr1, e1.addressNumber as num1, e1.neighborhood as bairro1,
         e2.id as id2, e2.name as name2, e2.instagram as ig2
  FROM establishments e1
  JOIN establishments e2 ON e1.address = e2.address 
    AND e1.addressNumber = e2.addressNumber 
    AND e1.id < e2.id
    AND e1.address IS NOT NULL 
    AND e1.address != ''
    AND e1.addressNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND e1.addressNumber != ''
    AND e1.neighborhood = e2.neighborhood
  WHERE (
    LOWER(e1.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e2.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(e2.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(e1.name, ' ', 1)), '%')
  )
),
unique_ids AS (
  SELECT id1 as id, name1 as name, addr1 as address, num1 as addressNumber, bairro1 as neighborhood FROM duplicate_pairs WHERE ig1 IS NULL OR ig1 = ''
  UNION
  SELECT id2 as id, name2 as name, addr1 as address, num1 as addressNumber, bairro1 as neighborhood FROM duplicate_pairs WHERE ig2 IS NULL OR ig2 = ''
)
SELECT id, name, address, addressNumber, neighborhood FROM unique_ids ORDER BY name LIMIT 300;
